English: To change the camera view, move the mouse or use the arrow keys while holding the right mouse button or the mouse wheel button.
Press Spacebar to jump while on the ground. While flying, press Spacebar to start or stop moving.
Flying becomes available at level 20 regardless of your class. Flying items can be purchased from the [Station] NPC in each town.
If you need HP, sit down using the Emotes menu. Resting takes time but saves money.
If you die, use Lodestar to revive in town. To revive at the place where you died, use a Scroll of Resurrection or have someone cast Resurrection on you.
Items that restore HP, MP, and FP - such as Food, Refreshers, and Vital Drinks - are most effective up to a certain value. Using them above that value restores less.
When you reach level 15, complete your job change quest as soon as possible. Until you do, you cannot gain additional EXP.
Press ESC to cancel your target.

To use a skill, open the Skill window (Hotkey: K) and drag the skill icon to the hotkey bar (F1-F10). To use a combo skill, drag the skill icon to the Action Slot (bottom-right of the screen), select a target, and press C.
Clean Hit must be placed first in the Action Slot to use Flurry.
To follow a character, click the target and select Follow from the menu. You can also press Z to follow the selected target.

You must be close to a character to open the interaction menu (Guild, Messenger, Follow, etc.). By default, left-click opens the menu. You can enable right-click instead in Options > Game > Right Click Player Menu.
Press X to toggle between walking and running.

Double-click a monster to attack it. This can be changed to single-click in Options > Game > Single Click to Attack. Basic attacks continue automatically while Auto Attack is enabled (Options > Game > Auto Attack).
